title: Lifecycle Authentication and Heartbeat Loop
interaction_flow: ProxyApp → LifecycleManager: new LifecycleManager({ hubUrl, store, logger, getTaskMeta })
LifecycleManager → Hub: POST /a2a/hello { protocol, protocol_version, message_type:'hello', sender_id, payload, env_fingerprint } [timeout 15s]
Hub → LifecycleManager: { payload: { status, node_secret?, reason? } }
LifecycleManager → ProxyApp: return { ok: false, error: reason }
LifecycleManager → MailboxStore: setState('node_secret', secret) [if new 64-hex secret returned]
LifecycleManager → ProxyApp: return { ok: true, nodeId, response }
loop every interval (with exponential backoff on failures)
LifecycleManager → Hub: POST /a2a/heartbeat { node_id, evolver_version, env_fingerprint, meta:{proxy_version, outbound_pending, inbound_pending, ...taskMeta} } [timeout 10s]
LifecycleManager → LifecycleManager: heartbeat({ _skipReauth: true }) [verify new secret]
alt data.min_proxy_version requires upgrade (_shouldUpgrade returns true)
LifecycleManager → MailboxStore: writeInbound({ type:'system', payload:{action:'proxy_upgrade_required', ...}, priority:'high' })
LifecycleManager → LifecycleManager: setTimeout(tick, backoff) [backoff = interval * 2^failures, max 30min]
key_relationships: LifecycleManager calls Hub via fetch (POST /a2a/hello, POST /a2a/heartbeat)
ProxyApp composes LifecycleManager (instantiated in ProxyApp constructor, started in ProxyApp.start())
AuthError extends Error (statusCode field, used to signal 401/403 auth failures)

key_methods.hello({ rotateSecret }): POST /a2a/hello with env fingerprint; stores new node_secret and node_id on success
key_methods.heartbeat({ _skipReauth }): POST /a2a/heartbeat with pending queue counts; handles 401/403 via reAuthenticate(), processes hub events/upgrade signals
key_methods.reAuthenticate(): Guard (reauthInProgress flag), loops up to MAX_REAUTH_ATTEMPTS: hello(rotateSecret:true) then heartbeat(_skipReauth:true) to verify
key_methods.startHeartbeatLoop(intervalMs): Sets _running=true, calls tick() immediately; reschedules via setTimeout with exponential backoff on failures
key_methods._shouldUpgrade(minVersion): Semver comparison of PROXY_PROTOCOL_VERSION vs hub-required minimum

important_notes: Authorization uses Bearer token from node_secret (store or A2A_NODE_SECRET env). Each request gets a random x-correlation-id. Secret rotation: hub returns new 64-hex node_secret in hello response which is persisted to store. Backoff: consecutive failures cause exponential delay up to 30 minutes. Re-auth guard prevents concurrent re-auth via _reauthInProgress flag.
